sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الضِّيَافَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ، حَيْثُ يُسْتَقْبَلُ الضُّيُوفُ بِأَحْسَنِ تَرْحِيبٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapsko gostoprimstvo smatra se osnovnim stubom lokalne kulture, gdje se gosti dočekuju s najljepšom dobrodošlicom.
sentences.translationEn: Arab hospitality is considered a fundamental pillar of local culture, where guests are received with the warmest welcome.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ لِلزَّائِرِ غَالِبًا الْقَهْوَةُ السَّوْدَاءُ الْمُرَّةُ مَعَ حَبَّاتٍ مِنَ التَّمْرِ السُّكَّرِيِّ لِتَحْقِيقِ تَوَازُنٍ مِثَالِيٍّ فِي الْمَذَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetiocu se često nudi gorka crna kafa uz nekoliko slatkih hurmi kako bi se postigla savršena ravnoteža okusa.
sentences.translationEn: Bitter black coffee is often served to the visitor along with some sweet dates to achieve a perfect balance in taste.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ عَلَى إِطْعَامِ الطَّعَامِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَعْكِسُ قِيَمَ السَّخَاءِ وَالْكَرَمِ الَّتِي تَمَيَّزَ بِهَا الْعَرَبُ مُنْذُ الْقِدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj nije ograničen samo na posluživanje hrane, već odražava vrijednosti velikodušnosti i plemenitosti po kojima su Arapi poznati od davnina.
sentences.translationEn: This custom is not limited to just serving food, but reflects the values of generosity and nobility that have characterized Arabs since ancient times.

sentences.arabic: وَيَجِبُ عَلَى الضَّيْفِ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَ الْقَهْوَةَ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى تَبَعًا لِلتَّقَالِيدِ الْمُتَعَارَفِ عَلَيْهَا فِي الْمَجَالِسِ.
sentences.translation: Gost treba piti kafu desnom rukom, u skladu s tradicijom koja je uobičajena na okupljanjima.
sentences.translationEn: The guest should take the coffee with their right hand, following the traditions commonly observed in gatherings.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُمْكِنُ تَقْدِيمُ الْبَخُورِ بَعْدَ الِانْتِهَاءِ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ لِتَعْطِيرِ الْمَجْلِسِ وَتَكْرِيمِ الزُّوَّارِ بِشَكْلٍ لَائِقٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, nakon jela se može ponuditi tamjan kako bi se namirisao prostor i na dostojan način ukazala počast posjetiocima.
sentences.translationEn: Incense can also be offered after finishing the meal to scent the room and honor the visitors in a proper manner.
